types.when_to_use: Use when the agent reaches a true fork and needs a human choice to proceed.
examples: Pick between architecture A vs B

types.description: Requests for externally provided game or media assets.
types.when_to_use: Use when the task is blocked on a human creating/procuring an asset.
examples: Need icon set for inventory UI
Need voice line recording for tutorial

types.description: Repo policy and behavior decisions for CLI or backend tooling.
types.when_to_use: Use when command semantics are ambiguous and product intent is required.
